title: Why you need a digital spring cleaning (and how Incogni makes it effortless)
summary: As winter finally thaws and the weather warms up, we’re all tackling our annual spring cleaning routines. title: Extreme weather in 2025 drove record wildfire emissions in Europe
summary: Europe, the fastest-warming continent, saw unprecedented wildfires and heatwaves in 2025, including a three-week hot spell that hit 30°C inside the Arctic circle
